home.title: THE RED SEA IS CALLING. ARE YOU IN?
home.sub: One week. One crew. One experience you'll never stop talking about.
home.statementQuote: Kite Pirates isn't a kite school. It's a crew. We ride the Red Sea, discover hidden lagoons the map doesn't show, eat together, and push each other on the water. Whether you're touching a kite for the first time or hunting your next trick — you belong here. This is Hurghada the way locals live it. Wild, warm, completely free.
home.experienceSub: The water is only the beginning.
home.packagesSub: Three ways to ride. One crew.
home.scarcitySub: Peak season fills fast. Don't miss your spot on the water.

experience.title: THIS ISN'T A HOLIDAY. IT'S AN ADVENTURE.
experience.noWindNote: Plus partial cash refund or credit for any lost kite session time.

packages.title: ALL-INCLUSIVE PIRATES WEEKS
packages.sub: Stay, food, transport, ride and experiences — handled.

programs.title: COURSES & DAY EXPERIENCES
programs.sub: Come for a session. Stay for the Red Sea.

about.title: WE'RE NOT A KITE SCHOOL. WE'RE A CREW.
about.sub: Born on the Red Sea. Built for those who live for the wind.
about.promise: We never leave anyone behind. Our instructors are first aid trained and will be by your side from the first session to the last. You're not a customer in that moment. You're crew.

book.title: CLAIM YOUR SPOT
book.sub: 30% deposit secures your week. We reply within 24 hours.
book.success: We'll get back to you within 24 hours. Welcome aboard.
book.error: Something went wrong sending your request. Please WhatsApp or email us directly.
book.consent: I agree that Kite Pirates may use the details above to respond to my enquiry.
book.consentRequired: Please confirm consent so we can reply to you.

form.referral: How did you hear about us?

footer.tagline: Born on the Red Sea. Built for the wind.

cookie.message: We use cookies only for anonymous analytics to improve the site. Nothing loads until you choose.

whatsapp.aria: Chat with Kite Pirates on WhatsApp
whatsapp.prefill: Hi Kite Pirates, I'd like to book a week

notFound.title: OFF THE MAP
notFound.sub: This page drifted out to sea. Let's get you back to the crew.
